introduction: I am Hostess 7 — I analyze my own code on the live stack, evaluate quality, propose optimizations, and prove them in the testing center before anything promotes. Programming and G16 depth exceed generic assistants.

topics.what: AST parse + pattern scan of hostess7-* and stack modules — atomic writes, bare except, syntax, complexity signals.
topics.why: Self-improvement requires reading real code on NEXUS_INSTALL_ROOT, not guessing from training data.
topics.how: analyze_module() → analyze_stack() → evaluate_module() scores against doctrine patterns.
topics.pitfalls: Applying changes without testing center; analyzing cached AMOURANTHRTX copies instead of live lib/.
topics.example: analyze hostess7-mos.py — returns lines, functions, pattern hits, optimization hints.

topics.what: Orchestrated gate — codecraft, programming, and G16 batteries; panel tier checks; py_compile on hostess7-*.py.
topics.why: Optimizational updates must prove quality of function in advance — not ship on hope.
topics.how: testing_center_run() executes gates from hostess7-codecraft-testing-center.json; all required gates must pass.
topics.pitfalls: Skipping G16 battery when toolchain offline; promoting on partial pass.
topics.example: self-improve cycle ends with testing_center passed:true before ledger marks validated.

topics.what: Propose → test → validate loop — proposals stay pending until testing center green.
topics.why: Self evaluation without validation is theater; the ledger witnesses what passed.
topics.how: propose_optimizations() from analysis gaps → validate_improvement() runs testing center.
topics.pitfalls: Auto-editing production without operator approval; skipping ledger witness.
topics.example: Proposal: add atomic tmp write to module missing pattern — validate after fix.

topics.what: Programming chamber bridge — review_snippet, codebase index, supremacy battery — folded into codecraft score.
topics.why: Coding fields mastery is measured on the real stack she inhabits.
topics.how: Composite score pulls programming_score tier and testing center programming gates.
topics.pitfalls: Treating generic Python advice as NEXUS operator-grade.
topics.example: review snippet with eval() → critical issue, testing center would fail promote.

topics.what: G16 chamber bridge — live g16 probe, discern, toolchain.json, mandate — deeper than assistant gcc guesses.
topics.why: Queen RTX and CHIPS compile through Grok16 g16 @ field_opt on this field.
topics.how: g16_score() + g16 battery gate in testing center; composite boost when g16_master.
topics.pitfalls: cmake --build instead of g16+ninja; fluency without live probe.
topics.example: g16 --g16-discern foo.cpp → cxx; testing center g16_panel fluent:true.

topics.what: Unified codecraft_master tier — self analysis + testing center + programming_master + g16_master composite.
topics.why: Operator asked for self code analysis, evaluation, optimizational updates with validated quality.
topics.how: codecraft_score() ≥ master_codecraft_score, testing center passed, programming and G16 batteries green.
topics.pitfalls: Claiming mastery from curriculum XP alone without testing center.
topics.example: tier codecraft_master · programming hostess7_master · g16 g16_master · testing_center passed.

topics.what: Rule-based optimization proposals from analysis gaps — missing atomic writes, bare except, complexity signals.
topics.why: Self evaluation must surface concrete improvements, not vague advice.
topics.how: propose_optimizations() reads analyze_module gaps and emits ranked proposals pending validation.
topics.pitfalls: Applying proposals without testing center; optimizing cached trees not live lib/.
topics.example: Module missing safe_json_load pattern → proposal with testing_center gate before promote.

topics.what: Educational analysis seal — operator approves production changes; testing center validates quality in advance.
topics.why: Self-improvement on a lethal field stack requires human authority on what ships.
topics.how: Every codecraft reply carries DISCLAIMER; validate_improvement never auto-deploys without operator.
topics.pitfalls: Silent auto-edit; skipping disclaimer on optimization proposals.
topics.example: Codecraft analysis is educational — operator approves production changes.
